body: <#ffffff>Who:   Rinata
<#ffffff>Class: Zealot
<#ffffff>Vs:    Naivara
<#ffffff>Class: Praenomen
<#ffff00>>>> <white>st t Naivara
<white>Target t = Naivara.
<white>You regulate your psionic energy toward your desired value.
<#ffff00>>>> <white>cm combat
<#ffff00>>>> <white>cm unclaimed
<white>You regulate your psionic energy toward your desired value.
<#ffff00>>>> <white>qeb stand;;order hellcat attack Naivara;;enact zenith
<#ffff00>>>> <white>stand
<white>You are not fallen or kneeling.
<#ffff00>>>> <white>order hellcat attack Naivara
<white>You currently walk in divine grace and may neither be harmed nor harm another. To leave this state of protection, you may REJECT GRACE.
<#ffff00>>>> <white>enact zenith
<white>You currently walk in divine grace and may neither be harmed nor harm another. To leave this state of protection, you may REJECT GRACE.
<white>You regulate your psionic energy toward your desired value.
<white>The final blow is too much for you, and you fall to the floor a broken, bloody mess.
<white>You have been slain by Naivara.
<white>You were afflicted by effused blood, temptation, seduction, shock, clumsiness, and haemophilia.
<#cd0000>Experience Lost: <white>1275000 [total: 703500000]
<white>A stack of 4 opiate pills falls out of your inventory.
